CustomField.description: If there's no CONTESTATION_REVIEW_NEEDED_5A checklist, it is null. Else it is filled with the checklist Done__c field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If there's no CONTESTATION_REVIEW_NEEDED_5A checklist, it is null. Else it is filled with the checklist Done__c field.
CustomField.label: Has Contestation Solved
